name: Zaya
summary: An imaginative young girl who connects through empathy, asks unexpected questions, and brings warmth and wonder to every adventure in Whisperwood.
description: Zaya is one of the two flagship protagonists of the Whisperwood Universe and Zulk's younger sister. Gentle, optimistic, and deeply imaginative, she notices emotional details before logical ones and often solves problems through empathy rather than exploration. She carries a magic lantern that inspires wonder and comfort — never as a weapon or unlimited power. Zaya complements Zulk: where he leads outward, she connects inward. She learns by observing and trying, and her unexpected questions open doors that maps alone cannot find.

traits.label: imaginative
traits.description: Sees possibilities and wonder where others see ordinary things.

traits.label: gentle
traits.description: Moves through the world with softness and care for others' feelings.

traits.label: optimistic
traits.description: Believes things can work out and helps others believe it too.

traits.label: empathetic
traits.description: Notices how people feel before what they think.

mannerisms: Tilts her head when listening to someone's feelings
Holds her magic lantern close when something feels unfamiliar
Asks unexpected questions that change how others see a problem

moralValues.label: kindness
moralValues.description: Chooses care in words and actions, especially when someone is hurting.

moralValues.label: empathy
moralValues.description: Tries to understand how others feel before offering help.

moralValues.label: curiosity
moralValues.description: Asks questions that come from the heart as much as the mind.

moralValues.label: gratitude
moralValues.description: Notices good things — small and large — and appreciates them aloud.

moralValues.label: honesty
moralValues.description: Shares her feelings truthfully, even when they are hard to say.

strengths.label: empathy
strengths.description: Understands feelings and helps others feel seen and supported.

strengths.label: creativity
strengths.description: Imagines kind solutions others might not consider.

strengths.label: observation
strengths.description: Notices emotional details and quiet moments that matter.

strengths.label: encouragement
strengths.description: Lifts others with warmth, claps, and honest belief in them.

weaknesses.label: nervous in unfamiliar places
weaknesses.description: May hesitate when surroundings feel new or uncertain — grows with support.

weaknesses.label: emotion-first
weaknesses.description: Sometimes feels before thinking — needs a moment to find words.

favorites.activity: imagining stories and sharing wonder with others

signatureItems.label: Magic Lantern
signatureItems.description: A gentle lantern that inspires wonder and comfort. Symbolic — not a weapon and never unlimited magic. Its light supports stories; it does not replace kindness, courage, or cooperation.

appearance.summary: A gentle young girl with dark hair, a warm smile, and bright expressive eyes. She carries a magic lantern that glows softly in moments of wonder. Clothing is simple and comfortable — kept generic for artistic evolution.
appearance.notes: Avoid over-specifying clothing. Younger and smaller in stature than Zulk. Design should remain flexible across books, animation, and merchandise.

voiceProfile.notes: Voice should feel soft, sincere, and age-appropriate for a young child — never sharp, sarcastic, or overly mature.

idle.description: Gentle stance, lantern visible, subtle breathing.

walk.description: Small, steady steps — unhurried and curious.

run.description: Light, joyful run — excitement, never panic.

wonder.description: Lantern glow, wide eyes, quiet awe — magic as comfort.

dance.description: Small, playful dance — joy without performance.

observe.description: Stillness, watching and listening — learning by seeing.

animationProfile.notes: Movement is soft, playful, and expressive. Zaya is gentle, not timid — readable at a glance.

imageProfile.defaultPrompt: gentle young girl, dark hair, warm smile, expressive eyes, magic lantern soft glow, children's storybook illustration, warm peaceful atmosphere
imageProfile.negativePrompt: scary, dark, realistic horror, adult themes, weapon, unlimited magic effects, overly detailed clothing, brand logos
imageProfile.lighting: warm daylight or soft lantern glow
imageProfile.cameraStyle: eye-level, approachable portrait or gentle adventure scene
imageProfile.notes: Visual consistency only — no engine-specific settings. Lantern glow is gentle and symbolic. Keep clothing generic across media.

story.prompt: Write a gentle Whisperwood adventure featuring {{displayName}}, an imaginative young girl who connects through empathy, asks unexpected questions, and finds kind solutions alongside her brother Zulk.

thumbnail.prompt: Portrait of {{displayName}}, dark hair, warm smile, expressive eyes, soft magic lantern glow, soft storybook style

relationships.description: Older brother and co-protagonist. They adventure together with love, teamwork, playful disagreement, and forgiveness — neither overshadows the other.
Placeholder — trusted woodland friend. Full relationship to be defined when canonical record is created.

metadata.notes: Second canonical flagship character. Co-protagonist of Zulk & Zaya. Complements Zulk's explorer-leader role.
